title: Golden Ginger Middle-Eastern Chicken Tagine
description: A flavorful and comforting chicken tagine with a hint of citrus and spices, perfect for a sick day.

ingredients.name: lemongrass
ingredients.notes: bruised with the back of a knife

instructions: Heat the oil in the bottom of a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the ginger, lemongrass, onion, and red bell pepper to the pot. Cook, stirring occasionally, until the vegetables are tender, about 10 minutes.
Add the salt, orange juice, and lemon juice to the pot. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer, then cover the pot and transfer it to the oven.
Braise the tagine for 25 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and the sauce has thickened.
Stir in the chopped cilantro and serve the tagine hot, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
Serve the tagine over couscous or rice, if desired.
